VLT Shade Visualizer

See It Before
You Tint It

The car shown is at factory clear. Select a tint shade to preview how dark your windows will look. Lower % = darker tint.

Dark / 15% VLT
Most popular choice. Great privacy, strong heat reduction.
CA Legal Note
Front side windows must be 70%+ VLT in California. Rear windows & back windshield can be any shade. We always keep your install legal.

Why Tint?

The Benefits of
Window Tint

Professional window tint isn't just about looks — it's one of the best investments you can make for your vehicle, your comfort, and your health.

🔒
Enhanced Privacy & Security

Tinted windows prevent prying eyes from seeing inside your vehicle — protecting your valuables, your passengers, and your peace of mind. Smash-and-grab theft drops dramatically when thieves can't see what's inside.

☀️
UV Ray Protection

Our premium films block up to 99.9% of harmful UV rays — the same rays that cause skin cancer, premature aging, and interior fading. Protect your skin on every drive and keep your leather, dash, and upholstery looking new for years.

🌡️
Temperature Regulation

Bay Area summers are no joke. Our Apex Ultra film rejects up to 96% of infrared heat, keeping your cabin dramatically cooler without working your AC to death. Less heat = less fuel, more comfort, longer AC life.

🕶️
Glare Reduction

Blinding sun glare and headlight reflection are leading causes of accidents. Quality tint cuts glare significantly, making every drive safer and less fatiguing — especially during Bay Area commutes at golden hour.

🚗
Enhanced Vehicle Style

There's no easier upgrade for your car's look than a clean tint job. It adds a sleek, finished appearance, ties the whole exterior together, and gives any vehicle — from a daily commuter to an exotic — that show-car edge.

🛡️
Shatter Protection

Window film holds shattered glass together in an accident or break-in, reducing the risk of injury from flying glass. A simple upgrade that adds a meaningful layer of safety for you and your passengers.

Our Services

Our Film
Lineup

01
Carbon Film
Entry Premium

Non-reflective carbon film with excellent heat and glare rejection. No signal interference, no fading — a sleek matte finish that lasts.

  • Good heat rejection
  • Matte, non-reflective look
  • No GPS/signal interference
  • Color-stable over time
02
C2 Ceramic
Ceramic Grade

Nano-ceramic technology delivers crystal-clear optics, strong heat rejection, and full UV protection — without touching your electronics or signals.

  • Superior heat rejection
  • High optical clarity
  • 99% UV protection
  • Electronics-safe
03
Apex Ultra
Best — 96% Heat Rejection

Our top-tier film. Apex Ultra delivers an industry-leading 96% heat rejection, keeping your cabin cool even under the Bay Area summer sun. Unmatched clarity, lifetime warranty.

  • 96% infrared heat rejection
  • 99.9% UV blocking
  • Crystal optical clarity
  • Lifetime warranty
  • Best for hot climates
04
Windshield Strip

Precision-applied top visor strip to cut sun glare while keeping forward visibility sharp and legal.

05
Full Windshield

Full windshield ceramic tinting for maximum comfort and UV defense — crystal-clear optics with the right VLT for California roads.

06
Tint Removal

Clean, professional removal of old or failing film. We prep your glass to factory-fresh condition before any new install.

Geoshield Authorized Installer
Why Geoshield

Film That
Performs

We exclusively install Geoshield window film — one of the most trusted names in professional-grade automotive tint. Manufactured to exacting standards, Geoshield film delivers real-world performance that holds up over time.

Whether you choose dyed, carbon, or ceramic, every roll we install is backed by Geoshield's reputation for optical clarity and durability.

  • Superior UV & infrared heat rejection
  • High optical clarity with zero distortion
  • Scratch-resistant hard coat finish
  • Fade-resistant, color-stable over time
  • Manufacturer-backed warranty
  • California legal VLT options available
Our Work

Clean Installs.
Every Time.

Real cars, real results. Every job is done with precision film-cutting and a bubble-free, haze-free finish — mobile or not.

Toyota Camry · Apex Ultra Ceramic
How It Works

Simple. Mobile.
Done Right.

01
Request a Quote

Fill out the form or call us. Tell us your vehicle and what you're looking for. We'll get back to you fast with pricing.

02
Book Your Appointment

Pick a time that works — at your home, office, or anywhere in the Bay. We work around your schedule.

03
We Come to You

Our mobile setup arrives fully equipped. No shop, no waiting room, no hassle. We handle everything on-site.

04
Enjoy the Ride

Drive away with a perfect install. Let the film cure and enjoy cooler, more private, sharper-looking glass — backed by warranty.

Bay Area Window Tint

Looking for Window Tint
Near You in the Bay Area?

If you're searching for car window tint near me in the Bay Area, SunShift Tint brings the shop to your door. We specialize in ceramic window tinting in the Bay Area for luxury vehicles, Teslas, BMWs, and everyday commuters alike.

We serve San Mateo, Palo Alto, San Jose, San Francisco, Oakland, Fremont, Sunnyvale, Santa Clara, Hayward, Concord, Berkeley, Walnut Creek, Daly City, Milpitas, and every city in between. No matter where you are in the Bay, we come to you — 7 days a week.

Our mobile window tinting service is fast, clean, and backed by Geoshield's professional-grade film and a lifetime warranty. Whether you want dark privacy tint, a nearly invisible UV-blocking ceramic, or anything in between — SunShift Tint is the Bay Area's best mobile tint option.
